'''sabacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbira|mbira]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbira|mbira]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sabacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæbæchæth|sæbæchæth]] || [[word:sæbæchæj|sæbæchæj]] || [[word:sæbæchæsh|sæbæchæsh]] || [[word:sæbæchæ|sæbæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sababachath|sababachath]] || [[word:sababachaj|sababachaj]] || [[word:sababachash|sababachash]] || [[word:sababacha|sababacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sabachath|sabachath]] || [[word:sabachaj|sabachaj]] || [[word:sabachash|sabachash]] || [[word:sabacha|sabacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sabafchath|sabafchath]] || [[word:sabafchaj|sabafchaj]] || [[word:sabafchash|sabafchash]] || [[word:sabafchaf|sabafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sabachatha|sabachatha]] || [[word:sabachaja|sabachaja]] || [[word:sabachasha|sabachasha]] || [[word:sabachaka|sabachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sabachath|sabachath]] || [[word:sabachaj|sabachaj]] || [[word:sabachash|sabachash]] || [[word:sabacha|sabacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sabachathal|sabachathal]] || [[word:sabachajal|sabachajal]] || [[word:sabachashal|sabachashal]] || [[word:sabachakal|sabachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sabachathatha|sabachathatha]] || [[word:sabachajaja|sabachajaja]] || [[word:sabachashasha|sabachashasha]] || [[word:sabachaka|sabachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sabachathan|sabachathan]] || [[word:sabachajan|sabachajan]] || [[word:sabachashan|sabachashan]] || [[word:sabachakan|sabachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sabachathaoro|sabachathaoro]] || [[word:sabachajaoro|sabachajaoro]] || [[word:sabachashaoro|sabachashaoro]] || [[word:sabachakaoro|sabachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
